📘 Interactive practice handbook

Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
Basic Practice Handbook

Master the core capabilities of Copilot Chat through 16 hands-on scenarios — from basic conversation to creative collaboration. Each scenario includes a prompt template and a screenshot of the actual output.

16Scenarios
4Capability groups
19Screenshots
2Sample files

📘 How to Use

  1. Open Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat.
  2. Paste the prompt from each scenario into the input box (click the 📋 Copy button to copy in one click).
  3. If a scenario needs a sample file, please ask your instructor (examples: a quarterly business review .docx, a landscape .png).
  4. Compare with the "Sample Output" screenshot to confirm expected results (click an image to enlarge).
  5. Before practicing each new scenario, click "New chat" on the left of Copilot to start a fresh conversation to avoid context bleed.
01
💡

Quick Q&A

Basic Chat

Ask Copilot a direct question to get a fast, concise explanation. Perfect for quickly grasping a new concept or looking up information.

Prompt
Explain in three sentences what a quantum computer is, and what the biggest difference is between it and a classical computer.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
02
📝

Summarize

Basic Chat

Paste a long block of text into Copilot and ask for a bullet-point summary. Great for news, reports, and long-form articles.

Prompt
Please summarize the key points of the following article as bullet points (no more than 5 bullets):

Artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming how businesses operate worldwide. From automation in manufacturing, to risk prediction in finance, to personalized recommendations in retail, AI has become a key competitive lever for enterprises. However, adopting AI also brings new challenges: workforce reskilling, data privacy, model bias, and ethical risk. McKinsey's 2024 report notes that more than 65% of companies have adopted generative AI in at least one business process, double the prior year. Experts advise that, beyond evaluating technology investments, business leaders should establish strong governance frameworks, train their workforce, and scale gradually from small pilots.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
03
✉️

Draft an Email

Basic Chat

Ask Copilot to draft business emails — specify tone, language, and format. Useful for rescheduling, thank-you notes, follow-ups.

Prompt
Please write a polite, professional email in English to my client, Manager Wang, letting him know that the product discussion meeting originally scheduled for next Wednesday at 3:00 PM needs to be moved because I have an unexpected business trip. Propose moving it to the same time next Friday and ask him to confirm whether that works.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
04
📎

Upload a File

Advanced Analysis

Click the "+" (Add and manage sources) at the bottom-right of the input box to upload a file, then ask Copilot to summarize, analyze, or answer questions about it.

Prompt
I have uploaded a file. Please:
1. Summarize the key points
2. Extract three key takeaways
3. Suggest three follow-up questions I could ask next
📎
Sample file: samples/q1_2025_business_review.docx
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
05
🔬

Research & Analysis

Advanced Analysis

Ask Copilot to perform market or trend analysis and compare multiple companies side by side.

Prompt
Please analyze the major trends in the global generative AI market in 2024, list the top five leading companies, and compare their differentiated strengths and challenges.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
06
🧠

Step-by-Step Reasoning

Advanced Analysis

Ask Copilot to answer a logic puzzle using "step-by-step reasoning" so you can see its thought process.

Prompt
Please answer using "step-by-step reasoning": A sealed room has three switches that each control one of three light bulbs in an adjacent room. You may enter the adjacent room only ONCE and must determine which switch controls which bulb. How would you do it? Explain the logic of every step.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
07
🌐

Web Search

Advanced Analysis

Copilot will search the web in real time and cite sources. Perfect for the latest news, policies, and updates.

Prompt
Please search and summarize Taiwan's 2025 individual income tax filing deadline, the tax bracket schedule, and any new rule changes this year. Include official source links.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
08
🖼️

Image Recognition

Content Creation

Upload an image and ask Copilot to describe its content, identify objects, and interpret the scene.

Prompt
Please describe what is in this image. Point out the main elements you see, the likely setting, and any interesting details.
📎
Sample file: samples/sample_landscape.png
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
09
💬

Suggested Prompts

Basic Chat

Ask Copilot to suggest follow-up questions based on context to help extend your line of thinking.

Prompt
Based on our conversation so far, please suggest 5 good follow-up questions I could ask you next to extend my thinking.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
10
📄

Generate a File

Content Creation

Ask Copilot to produce a Word, Excel, or PowerPoint file you can download and use.

Prompt
Please generate a Word document titled "First-Week Onboarding Plan for New Hires" that includes daily learning objectives, morning/afternoon activities, and a reflection question at the end of each day. Present the plan as a table.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
11
🎨

Generate an Image

Content Creation

Copilot's built-in Designer can generate illustrations, posters, or concept art from a text description.

Prompt
Please generate an illustration: an orange cat wearing engineer-style glasses, sitting in front of a laptop typing, with a modern minimalist office in the background, warm lighting, cartoon style.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
12
📊

Visualize Data

Content Creation

Ask Copilot to organize data into a table with trend commentary for fast comprehension.

Prompt
Please present, as a table, the market share changes from 2020 to 2024 of the top five global cloud service providers (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Alibaba Cloud, Oracle), and add a trend analysis below the table.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
13
🎤

Voice Chat

Interactive Experience

Click the microphone icon on the right of the input box to talk with Copilot by voice. Great for mobile or hands-free use.

Prompt
(Voice mode scenario): Start a voice chat and ask Copilot, "What are 5 quick stress-relief tips that an office worker can do in 5 minutes today?"
💡
Manual step: click the microphone icon on the right of the input box to start voice input.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
14
💻

Explain Code

Interactive Experience

Paste in code and ask Copilot to explain it line by line and analyze its complexity. Useful for learning and code review.

Prompt
Please explain the following Python code line by line and analyze its time complexity:

def fib(n):
    if n <= 1:
        return n
    a, b = 0, 1
    for _ in range(n - 1):
        a, b = b, a + b
    return b
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
15
⚡

Brainstorming

Interactive Experience

Ask Copilot to brainstorm multiple ideas, with execution steps and budget allocation for each.

Prompt
I want to host an online team-building event for 10 colleagues in my department, with a budget of NT$3,000 and a duration of 2 hours. Please brainstorm 5 creative ideas that drive team interaction, and explain how to run each one.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
16
🤝

Pages Co-authoring

Interactive Experience

Continue from the previous answer and ask Copilot to organize it into a Pages document that colleagues can co-edit in real time.

Prompt
Please organize the previous answer into a structured Pages document draft with a title, sections, key points, and action items, ready for me to invite colleagues to co-edit.
💡
Send this prompt as a follow-up message in the same conversation as Scenario 15. Copilot will automatically open the Pages editor on the right.
Sample Output
↑ Back to top
